## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between KrispCall and GrowthX to explore potential SEO partnership and AI-driven content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [KrispCall seeks expertise in content strategy and LLM/AI presence to improve organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a unique "software as a service" model with proprietary platform and experienced team](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Budget considerations: KrispCall has \~$15K available, needs convincing pitch for additional investment](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday, May 23rd, to present tailored strategy and ROI projections](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Topics

### KrispCall's Current SEO Situation

  - [Team of 35-37 members (SEO, content writers, link builders, technical specialists)](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [\~400 users/month, 80-90% organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Competing against larger players like Nextiva, OpenPhone, Dialpad](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Struggling with programmatic SEO scaling and AI/LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Focus on editorial content and programmatic content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Proprietary platform with workflows to enhance team efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Experienced team including former leaders from Fanatics, TripAdvisor, SEMrush, and TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Emphasis on "jobs to be done" framework and creating rich, question-answering content](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### AI and LLM Optimization Strategy

  - [Create content addressing key questions related to user jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Optimize for both traditional search engines and AI-powered platforms](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Use of markup and brand mentions to improve visibility](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Example: Ramp's success in ranking for expense category queries on both Google and AI search](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Content Refresh and Opportunity Identification

  - [Utilization of "Content OS" in Airtable for organizing and prioritizing content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Approach to refreshing existing content by analyzing competitors and enriching with key questions](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting for Friday, May 23rd at 9 AM Pacific Time](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare tailored strategy and ROI projections for KrispCall](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [KrispCall to include additional team members in the next call for broader buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [GrowthX to research KrispCall's product and current content to provide more specific recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Discuss potential engagement starting at $9K for editorial or $12K for programmatic (12-month deal)](https://fathom.video/share/E2x-_yqbYfzpDru2yBNTydNiJJzaAz3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
